response.justification: Candidate has 13+ years of solid full-stack engineering experience with strong craftsmanship (TDD, testing, CI/CD) and recent exposure to MCP and agentic workflows at re:cinq. However, the role requires 8+ years specifically building production-grade AI solutions, and the resume shows only ~1 year of explicit AI/agent work. There is no demonstrated experience with vector databases, RAG architectures, LLM optimization, or cloud-based AI systems at scale, and no Python in the listed skills. Strong generalist foundation but a significant gap against the staff-level GenAI requirements.
strengths: Strong software craftsmanship background with TDD, CI/CD, and mentoring/teaching experience aligning with technical-leadership expectations
Recent hands-on work with MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks at re:cinq
Polyglot full-stack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, and cloud (AWS CDK) with high-throughput systems exposure at Sociomantic
concerns: Only ~1 year of explicit GenAI/agent experience versus the 8+ years required for production-grade AI solutions
No demonstrated experience with vector databases, RAG architectures, or LLM performance optimization
Python not listed in skills despite being a primary required language; no evidence of AI systems on AWS/GCP/Azure at scale

key_factors.factor: Insufficient years of dedicated AI/GenAI production experience
Missing RAG, vector DB, and LLM optimization expertise
Recent MCP and agentic workflow exposure plus strong engineering craftsmanship
